description_short: This unique reversible pillow is plush on one side and firm on the other adapting to your sleeping position.

proprietary_tech.name: Dual-Side Design
proprietary_tech.description: Memory foam on one side, marshmallow foam on the other — flippable.

faq_specs.question: What makes this pillow stand out?
faq_specs.answer: This pillow has two unique flippable sides. It gives you the best of both worlds, offering appropriate head and neck support as well as plush comfort.

faq_specs.question: What are the two fills of the pillow?
faq_specs.answer: One side is made of memory foam and the other is made of marshmallow foam for different comfort levels.

notes_observed: Thickness extracted as 127mm/5" per layer but that's likely the total — confirm; dual-foam pillow is single physical block split A/B.
